skills.name: skill-core
skills.description: Skill Protocol v2 compiler and meta-skill for building Agent Skills at scale.

skills.name: job-prep-assistant
skills.description: Route job preparation: major + target role → score job-catalog, confirm, auto-install resume-tailor / behavioral-interview / tech-interview-lite.

skills.description: Parse job description, map requirements to real experience, produce tailored resume bullets — no fabrication.

skills.name: behavioral-interview

skills.name: tech-interview-lite
skills.description: Lite technical interview prep: JD-aligned fundamentals, algorithm drills, mock questions.
